description: CompositionBlack track pants made of 92% cotton and 8% elastane, with flattened seams, broad elasticated waist  with reinforced fabric that can be folded, reinforced tear points and brand metal tag below the waistFittingSlimWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, you and these pants have a lot in common. Made of a cotton-lycra fabric, this is perfect when you want that casual sporty look. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these cotton-lycra tracks allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the polyester allows you to stretch with much ease. Pair it with a t-shirt from the wide range available at myntra and achieve maximum performance on and off the field.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 37"Height-5'7”, Waist – 26”, Hips – 36”
